blockers: No frozen trial launcher currently binds the v4 coordinate-contract, configured-system, comparison, attempt, state, isolation, artifact, usage, and dual-rubric identities in one immutable record. The existing parent runner has already consumed its eight distinct frozen attempt IDs and refuses replacement; scripts/lh_isolated_launcher.py targets another pilot and lacks the v4 adapter.

The v4 manifest requires adoption observability before authorization, but the retained parent protocol separates guide presence from scores without a predeclared trace/artifact criterion for guide adoption. Adding one after treatment output would be post-hoc. A future version must freeze that rule before any calls.
